positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized graphic illustration of an ethereal fantasy woodland scene. The composition should be centered and balanced, featuring massive, luminescent fungi and stylized forest flora that glow with soft cyan and emerald light. Silhouettes should be sharply defined against a deep indigo and midnight blue background. Use a strong contrast style reminiscent of Art Deco stained glass and bioluminescent macro photography. The aesthetic must be clean, graphic, and highly scalable for apparel print. Focus on detailed textures on the leaves and crystalline structures on the mushrooms. Cinematic lighting, vector graphic quality, high detail, symmetrical composition.
